Danielle and Joe stick to their stories, but it's later revealed that five-year-old Elijah was found dead in that shallow grave with fentanyl in his system after the New Hampshire mom allegedly recruited her boyfriend to help dump the body. Investigators estimate the child died between September 21st and September 24th, 2021. Danielle ultimately pleaded guilty to second-degree murder and two counts of tampering with a witness. She was sentenced to 53 years behind bars. Joseph pleaded guilty to manslaughter, second-degree assault, falsifying physical evidence, and witness tampering in connection to the boy's death. He was sentenced to 22 to 45 years behind bars.
